brief_summary: Hero art for the Trends pillar piece on acoustic engineering — thock as engineering spec rather than happy accident: a 2px warm-grey keyboard side-profile silhouette with a 10-cap row on top, subtle plate + foam-stack internal layering, three concentric coral sound-wave arcs emanating from a single keycap, a coral origin dot with a tiny sine-wave glyph, and warm-bronze accents on the top and bottom case edges.
source: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — colorful keyboard SVGs (locked 2026-05-09)
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: Keyboard side-profile silhouette (case + plate + foam stack + 10-cap row) with three coral sound-wave arcs emanating from a single keycap on top of the case, a coral filled origin dot with a small sine-wave glyph, and warm-bronze edge accents on the top and bottom of the case profile.
